page_metadata.biotools__summary: INTEGRALL is a freely available, text-based search system developed to collect and organize information on integrons. There are more than 4800 integron sequences in the database.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: INTEGRALL is a freely available, text-based search system developed to collect and organize information on integrons. There are more than 4800 integron sequences in the database.
